string 2: Graaaaaaagh...!
The rage... of the Titaaaaans...!
Death... to Chronomon... Death... to Chronomon...
Chronomon, Chronomon, Chronomon, CHRONOMOOOOON!
Something is wrong...{next}
That's a lot of hate for the hero...{next}
Is that really Plutomon?{next}
I... FEEL... HNH... WRONG...! AGH... AAAGH... GAAAAAGH!
I-I... I... THIS... THIS... CANNOT... AGH... AAAAAAAGH...!

URGH... M-MY... NAME IS... PLUTOMON...!
ENEMY... OF... CHRONOMON...
GrAAAAAAAAAAAGH...!
Gwoooh...
No... I-I... am not...

Plutomon, the erstwhile king of the Titans who had reigned
over Iliad.

Forced to abdicate that throne, Plutomon made the underworld his
new kingdom, where he would hand down judgement to errant souls...
...and quietly lived out his eternity in Iliad's depths.
But, one fateful day...

...Plutomon, leading an army of Titans, suddenly appeared
and began a full-scale invasion of Iliad.

The brutal fighting that followed set the world on a path
toward destruction.

Our heroes marched into Plutomon's castle, hoping to stop
the Titan invasion of Iliad...

But there they encountered the living corpse of a Digimon—
the ruined form of what had once been Plutomon.
What in the world had become of Plutomon?
Who, if not Plutomon, was giving orders to the Titans?

Unraveling the truth behind this mystery may reveal a way
to circumvent the tragedies enveloping the worlds.
Plutomon, your progress thus far has been commendable.
You have made a fine puppet, indeed.
The hero's revival is soon upon us. That means your job is done...

You have some life left in you, do you? In that case...
I can still put you to work.

May you roam the world forever as a walking corpse,
thanks to the help of this chronolixir.
Who... are you?
Tell me. What has become... of the Digital World?
...I see.
You said you are... of Merukimon's ilk... Are you not?

Please inform Merukimon what I am about to tell you.
The fate of the Digital World hangs in the balance.

While being manipulated and controlled, I came to learn
the whole truth... The truth of the world, I should say.
This conflict, all of it... It was a setup—
—brought about by a "hero"... one fallen into darkness.

The hero Chronomon held power over time, allowing him to
decipher the Akashic Records stored deep within Iliad.

With power over time, Chronomon was a being of absolute
presence that reigned over Iliad.

But... one day, Chronomon learned of the truth of the world
from a record fragment engraved in the Akashic Records:
that this world was host to a higher being on a plane above ours.

Trace mentions of a creator-like being—one who conceived
all that we know—were inscribed in the Akashic Records.
This truth brought despair to Chronomon.

It meant that every occurrence was preordained, and he began to
see all of existence as gears in a machine crafted by that being.

Chronomon yearned to break the chains of fate that bound him. 
He ordered the warriors of Iliad—the Titans—into battle against the higher being.

The higher being's might was unmatched, and Chronomon was easily defeated. He was then
sealed away within the core of the device that governs time: the Akashic Records.

The Titans, deemed to be treasonous conspirators by the higher being, were
exiled to the lowest level of Iliad, and branded as villains of the Digital World.

All this time, I had no idea... that our old legends were
replete with fabrications.

I have always hated our so-called "history" of losing to the hero. 
Why did we Titans have to be subjected to such misery?

Titan control of the Current... That was the only thing that
could make up for being banished to the ends of the earth!
Taking advantage of my seething rage and hatred, it wormed its way in...

Chronomon's curse... his grudge... his bitter resentment at
being sealed away...

All of it... It was all Chronomon's plan, the plot of a vengeful 
traitor who painted itself a hero...
Please tell Merukimon the truth... Hurry...
...What? Plutomon was being controlled?

I see...! I will dispatch someone to treat Plutomon's
malady at once.

I gave Plutomon what treatment I could. It was touch
and go for a while... but he was able to pull through.

That is a relief. If we had failed to save Plutomon's life, 
the truth would have been lost to oblivion.

After saving Plutomon's life, he reveals Iliad's true past and
the hidden truths within its history.

The resentment and rage of a false hero who rose up against
a deity in ancient times...

...Chronomon's curse was the true catalyst behind the
events that plunged the world into chaos.

Chronomon's malevolent will manipulated some Titan
warriors from the shadows—

—throwing Iliad into chaos... and eventually helped to send
the world on a path to ruin.

Can those who uncovered the truth of the world put a stop
to Chronomon's machinations?

The ongoing threat to the order of the world was engineered
by a conspirator seeking to strike at the higher being.

Chronomon, the destroyer, gave birth to an egg. It has 
become a cocoon, from which a demon threatens to emerge.

Everything was planned from the start. Including this war.
All to give birth to a demon, fallen to darkness.

As such, the Dark Shadow will not stop consuming despair.
Someone must offer their aid...

All I can offer you, however, is advice... for it is the
higher being's desire that this world be self-reliant.
...Plutomon told me everything.

I find it difficult to believe everything he said, but I also
find it difficult to think all he said were lies.

We know one thing for sure: the Titans continue their
campaign of destruction, even now.
And Plutomon is not the one spearheading their offensive.
From the intel we have gathered...

The Titan puppet master may be after a certain
something in the human world...
It's going to open the gate and invade the human world?{next}
It's going to trigger the Shinjuku Inferno!{next}
History is going to repeat itself...{next}

Yes... This mastermind seems to be attempting to cause
something to transpire there.

What you describe is impossible to imagine. So many
robbed of their futures... humans and Digimon alike.

The peaceful lives of countless Digimon and humans snatched
away... And you say you know of this future for certain?
It seems the tragic future you saw is threatening to unfold.

I cannot leave while we are still recovering here. I fear
the Titans may strike again if I give them an opening.

I suggest you return to your world posthaste and consult
with Dr. Simmons about the impending crisis.
